privileged_info_summary: The task uses the real Mycobacterium tuberculosis H37Rv reference genome (NC_000962.3) downloaded from NCBI. The target gene katG (locus tag Rv1908c) is located on the minus (complement) strand at coordinates 2153889..2156111. The length of the CDS is 2223 base pairs. An extraction including exactly 600 bp upstream and 150 bp downstream yields a total expected sequence length of 2973 bp. The extraction report must include the correct strand orientation and original coordinates.
